Assoc. Prof. Dr. Özgür Orhangazi Nominated for Marie Curie Success Story

Kadir Has University Department of Economics faculty member Prof. Dr. Özgür Orhangazi’s research project titled “Financialization, economic development and crisis” within the scope of the EU 7th Framework Marie Curie Programs has been successfully completed. The project was nominated as a “success story” candidate by the EU Research Commission, taking into account its extensive research and publication activities.
